description: A person that buys, has bought, or obtained products, resources and/or services from the enterprise or receives free offers for products, resources and/or services. This is modeled as a party playing the role of customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the party role.

items.description: A billing account accumulates all charges from products and contracts that will be shown on the same invoice or prepaid statement.

id.description: ID of the billing account.

externalId.description: ExternalId of the billing account.

validFor.description: StartDateTime must be earlier than EndDateTime.

startDateTime.description: Start dateTime of the time period. The value is inclusive, including the starting point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.

endDateTime.description: End dateTime of the time period. The value is exclusive, excluding the ending point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure of the value.

comprisedOf.description: Child/Children of the characteristic value, if any.

endUserNotificationConfiguration.description: End User Group Notification Configuration for a customer. This is used for storing all configuration information pertaining to notification groups.

items.description: The NotificationGroupConfiguration entity contains all personalization information pertaining to a notification group.

notificationGroup.description: The Notification Group for which the personalization is applicable. Valid notification groups are as per enumeration "NotificationGroup".

isOptIn.description: Indicates if the notificationGroup is opted-in/opted-out by end-user.

isDefaultChannel.description: Indicates if the end-user has personalized the channel preference for the notificationGroup or if system default channel should be applied.

enabledChannelId.description: The list of channel Ids that are selected by the end-user for receiving this notificationGroup's messages.

disabledChannelId.description: The list of channel Ids that are selected by the end-user for not receiving this notificationGroup's messages.
